# Configuration format version 26.3 revision 0
configure {
    router "Base" {
        autonomous-system 65001
        interface "system" {
            ipv4 {
                primary {
                    address 1.1.1.1
                    prefix-length 32
                }
            }
        }
        interface "to-r2" {
            ipv4 {
                primary {
                    address 10.0.0.0
                    prefix-length 31
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
/configure router "Base" delete interface "to-r2"
